steps.prompt: This is an AND gate. I wonder — what happens if you turn the top switch on?
steps.feedback: Still dark! AND needs both switches. Turn the bottom switch on too.

steps.prompt: Now turn the bottom switch on.
steps.feedback: Both on — the lamp lights up! AND only works when both switches are on. Turn the top switch off — what do you think happens?
The lamp goes out! AND stops the moment one switch turns off. Both must be on.
